programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In a Top Chef first, the final five travel to one of the top culinary destinations in the world - Italy. First the chefs must make an apertivo for 30 locals from the town of Lucca that pairs perfectly with a Peroni beer. Then, they have the experience of a chef’s lifetime, hunting the elusive white truffle which they must use in a dish for a Tuscan food festival. There’s no room for error, as the chefs are making dishes for not just Tom, Padma and Gail but avant-garde Italian Chef Cristiano Tomei, Truffle expert Cristiano Savini and a host of locals.

programme.desc: With the Rustbucket stopped on the Midwest roadside, Ben locks himself inside with his tablet as Max and Gwen enjoy the great outdoors, until Team Tennyson is pulled into a wild Jack-a-Lope chase.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: While on a tour at a space museum, Ben's excitement multiplies when he learns that some recently discovered 'space stuff' is being examined inside the museum's lab.

programme.desc: Sunny has to perform for his old school teacher and mentor.

programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Li'l D finds out that Sunny will have to spend his Saturday relaxing at a teacher's retreat instead of tackling his weekend To-Do List Li'l D proposes that he and the Westley kids do Sunny's chores in exchange for the use of Sunny's state-of-the-art home studio. But when Li'l D throws away Sunny's How To Do the To Do List the kids soon find that getting things done just might do them in.

programme.title: Ruby and the Well S2
programme.desc: A new wish leads Ruby to reunite a family.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: It's been five years since Hiccup and Toothless successfully united dragons and vikings on the island of Berk.

programme.title: Jersey Girl
programme.desc: When a successful publicist finds himself an unemployed single father back living with his dad in the suburbs, he learns to acknowledge what truly makes him happy.

programme.title: Bel-Air S2

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim tells the fate of the House of Helm Hammerhand, the legendary King of Rohan.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode in the All Stars competition, the chefs are treated to a culinary dream trip to Parma, the legendary home of Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and Prosciutto di Parma ham. After getting a behind the scenes tour of some traditional multi-generational factories of these exclusive products, the chefs must feature these ingredients in two courses and serve their dishes to a table of 16 Michelin stars. Pasta master, Chef Evan Funke, sits in as the guest judge along with Tom, Padma, Gail and a bevy of celebrated Italian super-star chefs. One chef is eliminated as only the top three will move on to the finale.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: In Chile's Torres del Paine melt from snow-covered mountains feeds finger-like fjords as they reach out to the sea to join the current lowering its salinity. Rivers estuaries and wetlands are home to many wading birds and the countless inlets and bays are magnets for rare dolphins and orcas.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The Humboldt Current is slower than most ocean currents but it’s the most dynamic in the world because it travels for such a long distance. Upwelling from the deepest trenches brings nutrients to the surface allowing phytoplankton to bloom laying the foundation for an intricate marine food chain

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The current is followed by a unique population of Chilean blue whales and is the last refuge for other extremely rare marine mammals. From the chill of its deepest depths to the wind on its highest cliffs the current creates unusual habitats and is a study in survival.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Meet the extraordinary miniature animals, who use their small size to survive against all odds in the world’s most deadly environments.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Extraordinarily large animals need extraordinary adaptations. From mighty whales to forest monsters, these are the epic survival stories of nature’s giants.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Living your life at night can present extreme challenges - and massive opportunities. In this world without light, danger lurks around every corner.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, Mike Davidson is on streets, in tunnels, on tracks and in trolley restoration garages - working shoulder-to-shoulder with the team that keeps one of America's largest and oldest mass transit systems running smoothly and on time.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: From heiress of a giant media empire to wanted felon, witness the strange saga of the Patty Hearst kidnapping of 1974.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the drama of the 'Son of Sam' murders, presented the way the events were covered at the time.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: From the engineering wonders of ancient Rome to the bloody medieval battles of Tuscany, and the colossal marble quarries of Carrara, journey across Central Italy and discover it like never before - from the air.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: Journey from the fashion capital to Milan, across the great canals of Venice to the otherworldly peaks of the Dolomites and the colorful coast of Cinque Terre to discover Northern Italy like never before - from the air.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, the Ungulate team prepare for a birth, we meet one of the longest living animals and Auckland Zoo helps to save an endangered giant.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: In Chile's Torres del Paine melt from snow-covered mountains feeds finger-like fjords as they reach out to the sea to join the current lowering its salinity. Rivers estuaries and wetlands are home to many wading birds and the countless inlets and bays are magnets for rare dolphins and orcas.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The Humboldt Current is slower than most ocean currents but it’s the most dynamic in the world because it travels for such a long distance. Upwelling from the deepest trenches brings nutrients to the surface allowing phytoplankton to bloom laying the foundation for an intricate marine food chain

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The current is followed by a unique population of Chilean blue whales and is the last refuge for other extremely rare marine mammals. From the chill of its deepest depths to the wind on its highest cliffs the current creates unusual habitats and is a study in survival.

programme.desc: A nurse's aide walks home after a family gathering. Another young woman goes out to get cold medicine.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S9)
programme.desc: Only days into the winter mining season, a regulator freeze up cuts off Shawn's air supply. Emily negotiates with Mr. Gold for season-saving coordinates.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It’s their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown (S10)
programme.desc: Josh saddles up to investigate a scandal over Wild West legend Buffalo Bill Cody’s remains. The body may have been stolen and buried 500 miles away.

programme.title: Gold Rush (Specials) (S16)
programme.desc: Rick Ness takes a job working on 16-year-old Parker Schnabel's gold mine. The two miners form a strong bond, bringing in millions in gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S10)

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S10)

programme.title: The Matter of Facts - How Big Tech Is Making Fools of Us
programme.desc: Are you being fooled by disinformation? Hamish Macdonald examines that question as he meets with a range of participants, tech experts, nerds and disruptors to discover what's happening to our brains and belief systems.

programme.title: The Way We Wore - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this final episode, Celeste Barber tracks the ascent of Australia's fashion sector, tracing its roots from early bespoke seamstresses to the multi-billion-dollar international enterprise it is today.

programme.title: Art Works - Jen Cloher, TMAG, Thabani Tshuma
programme.desc: Namila's at Melbourne's NGV International; singer-songwriter Jen Cloher discusses their new album; cultural objects return to lutruwita for an important new exhibition at TMAG; and a performance by slam-poet Thabani Tshuma.

programme.title: End Game with Tony Armstrong - Episode 1
programme.desc: Tony Armstrong, the former AFL player turned award-winning broadcaster travels to the UK, as he starts a global search for solutions that could help drive systemic change back home.

programme.title: Alone Australia - Episode 6
programme.desc: Food is in extraordinary abundance for some survivalists, while others struggle with empty bellies and question their future in the competition.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 98
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite to Eat with Alice - John Safran
programme.desc: Author and documentarian John Safran shines a light on a Jewish staple, while Alice tries to change his mind on cauliflower.

programme.title: If you're Listening - Black Swans - Black Swans (Part 1) the Population Bomb
programme.desc: For years, many feared our planet would be stripped by the weight of a colossal population. In 2026 we've found ourselves in a world where we're not scared about having too many babies, but too few. So what happened?

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 138
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 77
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: The Way We Wore - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this final episode, Celeste Barber tracks the ascent of Australia's fashion sector, tracing its roots from early bespoke seamstresses to the multi-billion-dollar international enterprise it is today.

programme.title: Planet America - Episode 16
programme.desc: Chas and John discuss the events of the week after President Trump's Trip to China to meet with Xi Jinping. What does it mean for the global economy, security and relations between the two superpowers?

programme.desc: The Pacific region is rich with culture, people and stories. Johnson Raela and Alice Lolohea bring you the stories that matter to the Pacific and the most up-to-date information, from journalists with deep regional expertise.

programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, employees and business owners big and small. Presented by Kirsten Aiken.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 99

programme.title: ABC News Mornings - Episode 99
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News at Noon - Episode 99
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Australian Story - Episode 13
programme.desc: In 2026, Logie-award-winning documentary program Australian Story celebrates 30 years sharing compelling stories about real people that illuminate, entertain and inspire. The power of the personal. Presented by Leigh Sales.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Julia Roberts and Hugh Grant star in this delightful romantic comedy about a world-famous movie star who falls in love with a bookstore owner while the whole world watches.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A police detective, a bank robber and a high-power broker enter high-stakes negotiations after the criminal's brilliant heist spirals into a hostage situation.

programme.title: Pocketful of Miracles
programme.desc: A gangster from New York and his girlfriend decide to help an apple vendor who is distressed because her daughter is set to marry the son of a count assuming that she is rich.

programme.title: Legion
programme.desc: When God loses faith in mankind he sends his Legion of angels to wipe out the human race for the second time. Man's only hope lies in a group of misfits holed up in a desert diner. With the help of the Archangel Michael, these strangers must deliver a baby they soon realize is the second coming and their last chance at redemption.

programme.title: I Am Legend
programme.desc: After a biological war, Robert Neville is the last healthy human living on Earth, but he is not alone.

programme.desc: The crew of a World War II warship is goaded into rising up against their new, mentally unstable ship's captain.

programme.title: U.S. Marshals
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Samuel Gerard and his team of Marshals are assigned to track down Sheridan, who has been accused of a double-murder.

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
programme.desc: Aralin ang pagpapantig, pagbibigay ng kahulugan sa mga salita, pagbuo ng mga pangungusap, pagbabasa ng teksto, at kung ano ang mga pang-ukol, pang-abay, at salitang kilos.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Understand more about time, standard measures of length, mass and capacity and area through square-tile units, alongside pictographs with and without scales.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Identify pronouns and prepositions, and how to read, match, and write words that use short vowels.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Pahalagahan ang kagalingang pansibiko bilang pakikibahagi sa mga layunin ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa pangngalan, panghalip, at iba't ibang elemento ng kuwento, at kung paano magsulat ng kuwento at magbigay ng kahulugan ng mga salita.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Know how to convert time, what are the linear, mass and capacity measures, the area of square and rectangle, bar graphs, and outcomes of an event.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Learn more about adjectives, adverbs, maps, graphs, how to read words, and how to restate facts from texts.

programme.title: Half Brothers

programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Croc Watch and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall - EP 4
programme.desc: With his trademark adventure-style approach, Steve takes us to South Africa’s Ndumo Game Reserve to explore the dangerous world of hippos and crocs. Remarkable moments include the tagging of a formidable three-meter-long crocodile the unique dietary habits of hippos (and how they cause conflict with local farmers) and how vulnerable these creatures are to climate change.

programme.title: Lingo UK S2 - EP 15
programme.desc: In this game show, hosted by the iconic RuPaul, the simplest of words could be worth thousands of dollars. Lingo is the fast paced word-play game that keeps on innovating for new audiences, with its mix of skill, tension, humour and the chance to win big cash prizes. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

As they do, they are pursued by the Explorers, a mysterious organization seeking Liko's pendant for unknown reasons.

programme.title: On The Red Dot - EP 2
programme.desc: Tensions rise as Khoon Seng opens a new shop despite his parents’ objections, while Jarren tries to modernise his mum’s uniform store. Can they save the family businesses?

programme.title: Talking Point - EP 5
programme.desc: Singaporeans lost S2.1 million from unused beauty packages in 2025, the highest prepayment losses ever recorded for any industry. Talking Point goes undercover: Is there something deeper at play?

programme.title: Kin - EP 348
programme.desc: Jessica poisons Ah Yoke's mind about James' motives for returning to the company. Kenneth and Nina fall out after Kenneth loses his cool over a comment made by a viewer at Nina's streaming.

programme.title: Clean it, Fix it – Series 4 - EP 20
programme.desc: Master builder and household favourite Tommy Walsh, expert pro cleaner Maxine Dwyer and creative carpenter Asher Edwards help people across the UK to renovate and improve their homes. The team has two days to transform a living space in desperate need of some love. Series 4 sees enterprising co-presenter Mark Wright and a new expert de-clutterer join in the challenge of making tired homes relievable – without breaking the bank.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1 - EP 40
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef’s Line?

programme.title: The Chase S16 - EP 34
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42 - EP 136
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Moneyball S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Ian Wright presents the game show where the difference between winning life-changing money and going home with nothing rests entirely on the roll of a ball.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 65
programme.desc: As Aunty Lee closes in on the sinister scheme behind the children’s collapse, Cherril uncovers a shocking truth that forces her out of Noel’s house — and may spell the end of their marriage.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight
programme.desc: The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Big Adventures: Into the Gobi Desert with Nick Knowles - EP 1
programme.desc: Nick Knowles returns for a truly spectacular adventure, this time in the most desolate place on earth, the Gobi Desert. At five times the size of the UK, with the smallest population on earth, Mongolia is vast and remote and the stunning wilderness of the Gobi covers a third of the country.

programme.title: Code of Silence - EP 6
programme.desc: When the police ask Deaf catering worker Alison to lip-read criminals' conversations, she is plunged into a high-stakes new world. Her assessment of the gang’s clandestine meetings quickly becomes key to unlocking the investigation. But as she finds herself increasingly drawn to one of the suspects, Alison’s feelings about the case become complicated.

programme.title: Murder in a Small Town S1
programme.desc: Karl Alberg moves to a quiet coastal town to soothe a psyche that has been battered by big-city police work, but finds himself needing to call upon all his skills to solve the murders that continue to wash up on his shore.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 19 关键证人
programme.desc: Zhi Ming was about to search for the homeless man when Guo Ying finds him. Guo Ying accompanies him, and the two find the homeless man. They finally claim the necklace pendant from him, but Guo Ying suddenly attacks Zhi Ming and snatches it away. Although Zhi Ming had the chance to get the pendant back, he did not want to hurt Guo Ying. Guo Ying takes the chance and escapes with the pendant.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 20 关键证人
programme.desc: Guo Ying is kidnapped, Zhi Ming and Yu Xuan also fall prey to assassins. When Zhi Ming wakes up, he realises Guo Ying and Yu Xuan are tied up, and Mary has a ticking time bomb attached to her. Mary tells him Lao Ying is angry because Zhi Ming refuses to obey to him. Zhi Ming is asked to choose between killing Guo Ying and Yu Xuan, or have the time bomb on Mary explode. What will Zhi Ming do?

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 3 少年歌行
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. His first heroic deed does not go as planned since he ended up owing the owner Xiao Se a debt for the damages to his place. Left with no choice, Lei Wu Jie takes Xiao Se along. On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 4 少年歌行
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. His first heroic deed does not go as planned since he ended up owing the owner Xiao Se a debt for the damages to his place. Left with no choice, Lei Wu Jie takes Xiao Se along. programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 25 我爱钟无艳
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 7 前线追踪
programme.desc: In Singapore, crow numbers are rising, bringing noise and even attacks, prompting authorities to reintroduce culling measures. At the same time, relentless cicada noise and its presence are affecting residents, but why are Tampines Changkat residents the hardest hit? In a city close to nature, how do we truly coexist?

programme.title: Kid U Not - EP 15 孩是老的辣
programme.desc: Jiade gets injured saving Manle. Meizhen gets sabotaged by her colleagues and fired. Yutong uses AI-generated videos to help Ching Har vent her frustrations and find peace. Done with this mission, the trio find themselves assigned with Mission Impossible. Chris falls ill. As she reminisces the days of being cared for by Mary, Mary appears. Her odd behaviour soon draws the trio’s suspicion.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 34 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Heroes in White - EP 18 侠医
programme.desc: Weimin becomes conflicted about returning to TCM practice as memories of his past resurface, though he still treats an injured Zhixiong who comes to him for help. Yingchen encourages him to reopen his clinic, but he remains unable to move on from his past trauma.

programme.title: Focus - EP 7 焦点
programme.desc: Focus explores how the U.S., under Donald Trump, reshapes global politics through tariffs, sanctions, and military, while nations like China, Iran, and Russia fight back in a global race of adaptation. Theatre director Kuo Jian Hong directs Lao Jiu: The Musical for the fourth time, continuing the legacy of Kuo Pao Kun and promoting Chinese-language theatre with River Valley High School.

programme.title: Taste of Life - EP 1098 甘味人生
programme.desc: Chu-Tsai, Chao and his wife have five children. Devoted all his life into developing soy sauce products, Chu-Tsai very much hopes that one of his kids can follow his footsteps and take over his business, but he also respects their own passions and aspirations. Because of their father's invention dream, the Chao brother's lives are about to change.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 312
programme.desc: A premium, natural supplement trusted globally for over 20 years. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Collagen Diamond Pro
